facts.claim: Source: trilhas-frontend @ commit f9656be2660ec2048ce6240b4ac418b7fe7d5a5b. Scale: 463 .ts/.tsx files; 153 .less files (4,888 lines); 117 component dirs (281 .tsx, 126 .less); 27 routed pages.

Two colour systems, unrelated by design: brand chrome (--primary-color, tenant-overridable) vs clinical severity (statusTrilha, static/immutable). Conflating them is the top-flagged risk for reintroducing a patient-safety bug.

Stack: Next.js 12 + React 17 + AntD ^4.21.7 (pre-v5 Less theming) via next-plugin-antd-less ^1.8.0; Firebase 8 (Firestore only); agora-rtc-react (video); raw w3cwebsocket (notifications); nookies (cookie SSR auth); PT-BR only, no i18n. Base AntD theme compiled at build time via getThemeVariables({dark:true,compact:true}) + 15 brand vars -> ONE CSS bundle for all users/tenants; no build-time light variant exists.

Per-tenant brand colour (cor_primaria hex) applied client-side via changeColorTheme: (a) dynamic-antd-theme.changeAntdTheme(color) runtime Less recompile, (b) sets CSS vars --primary-color and --primary-shadow-color(=color+'2e'). Applied twice -> flash-of-wrong-colour (default #fe6d01 forced on mount, real tenant colour re-applied later). --primary-color used at >=60 call sites; this hex is the ONLY per-tenant customization surfaced anywhere.

Theming = 5 stacked mechanisms: (1) build-time dark+compact AntD compile, (2) client-only stock-AntD light overlay via cascade, (3) ~30 manual light-mode patch rules, (4) ~23 per-component hand-rolled .light hex blocks, (5) runtime per-tenant AntD recompile. Light toggle = full window.location.reload(), no live switch.

Full formal token set = 15 Less vars: @primary-color #fe6d01 (live,14 uses), @secondary-color #606060 (live), @primary-color-shade=darken(@primary-color,47%) (live,1 use), @background-color #333 (unwired), @success-color #258a10, @info-color #1a3bb7, @default-color #bbbbbb (never ref'd by name), @danger-color/@error-color #ff1633 (aliased, name unused), @warning-color #d6a400 (name unused; runtime var(--warning-color) expected but NEVER SET - live defect), @skeleton-text #eee3, @degree 120deg, @grad-perc -100%, @header-opacity 0.8, @border-width 3px (5 dead). Duplicated verbatim as a JS object in next.config.js (the real build input); variables.less itself is never @import-ed.

statusTrilha.ts hex table (real clinical severity system, 5 states x 6 shades): NEUTRO color=#5BCE85 background=#16302A backgroundLight=#E1FCE0 ballColor=#00DC50 ballBackground=#08712E backgroundShade=#08712E1A. VERMELHO color=#C54C5C background=#412125 backgroundLight=#FCE4DD ballColor=#FF1633 ballBackground=#740614 backgroundShade=#7406141A. AMARELO color=#cebc5a background=#443f23 backgroundLight=#fffadb ballColor=#ffd900 ballBackground=#726208 backgroundShade=#7262081A. LARANJA color=#F9A65A background=#4A2B1F backgroundLight=#FFEDDD ballColor=#ff5900 ballBackground=#712B08 backgroundShade=#7137081A. ASSISTIDO color=#4FBFE1 background=#04314A backgroundLight=#DCFDFB ballColor=#00B0FF ballBackground=#0060A0 backgroundShade=#0060A01A.

statusTrilha semantics: NEUTRO/VERMELHO/AMARELO/LARANJA map to API alert severity (ocupacao.alerta, trilha.alerta, mensagem.alerta, criterio.alerta); ASSISTIDO always overrides raw alert colour when assistido===true. Typed as any, consumed via inline style by 7 components: InfoPacienteHeader, CollapseCard, DashboardCard, MessageBallon, FeedBallon, TabRecomendacoes, ItemNotificacao. Independent of --primary-color.

Colour-literal sprawl: 188 hex occurrences (77 distinct) + 18 rgb/rgba/hsl + 15 named keywords ~= 221 raw literals in .less vs 31 uses of the 15 declared vars by name (14=@primary-color) -> ratio ~7:1. Plus 119 inline hex in .tsx/.ts. Total ~340 raw literals vs 15 tokens; brand orange retyped 3 ways ('#fe6d01' 3x, '#ff6d00' 1x, '#ff5900' 1x). No light/dark surface scale; top unmapped literals #212433(13x), #141414(12x), #f1f1f1(11x), #fff(10x), #2a2a2a(8x), #fafafa(7x), #323739(7x), #f1f4fb(6x), #434343(6x).

Typography: family Poppins loaded twice (Google Fonts wt 400/500/600+italic400 + a dead malformed @font-face). No monospace anywhere. Root html font-size non-monotonic: 93.75% at <=1590px, 85.5% at <=1480px, 100% at <=1260px - cascade means the 85.5% shrink only applies in 1261-1480px band. 20+ value unscaled font-size ramp (12px x14, 14px x6, 0.75rem x5, 16px x4...), px/rem mixed. Only 4 font-weight literals in .less; line-height essentially undeclared.

Spacing: no @spacing-* vars, implicit uncodified 4/8-multiple bias (padding 8px x11, 1rem x11; margin-top 0.5rem x13). Border-radius: 13 literals in 3 clusters - small(8px/0.5rem/6px/10px), card(16px/0.625rem/0.75rem/1rem), circular(50% x17); unit inconsistency confirmed 8px===0.5rem, 10px===0.625rem, 12px===0.75rem. @border-width:3px dead; real borders use 1px/3px/4px/5px.

Shadows: 23 box-shadow declarations, two languages - flat drop-shadows vs neumorphic dual-shadow pairs. Example dark pair: 5px 5px 10px #0b0b0b, -5px -5px 10px #1d1d1d (ItemDefault); its light variant swaps to a flat 0px 0px 10px #d1d1d1 instead of dual-shadow - no shared elevation token. Neumorphic style flagged as a brand signature worth a formal elevation-token pair. Z-index: 11 distinct literals (1 x10, 99999 x2 full-screen overlay, 1031 x2 nprogress...), no scale. Motion: no tokens; ad-hoc 0.2s-1s durations, keyframes slide-in/out-top(0.25s), fadeIn(0.5s).

Breakpoints, two non-integrated systems: (a) CSS @media, 33 distinct widths 324px-1590px, mostly one-off; repeated only 768px(12x), 1260px(4x), 700px(3x). (b) JS-driven (dominant): collapseRule=1260(px), collapseRuleMobile=800(px) in src/utils/constants.ts, via useWindowSize()+useMemo in 49 files (42 reference collapseRule). One lone Less var @collapse-rule:1260px duplicates the JS constant as a drift-prone literal.

Light mode: cookie theme.light; toggle = window.location.reload(), no live switch. LightTheme.less re-imports stock antd/dist/antd.css over the dark bundle via cascade + ~30 patch rules. 23/153 .less files hand-roll &.light{} with hardcoded colours (isLight prop threaded through ~30+ components); naming outlier ProtocoloSepseContent.less uses &.is-light vs 43 other &.light. --warning-color permanently unset (live defect). PWA manifest colours disconnected (theme_color=#000000, background_color=#FFFFFF); product name still 'teleUTI'.

117 top-level dirs under src/components (281 .tsx, 126 .less). Two icon systems, no shared sizing contract: MDI via @mdi/js wrapped by MaterialIcon (size=1em+anticon class); bespoke hand-drawn SVG .jsx for clinical roles (Enfermagem, Farmaceutico, Fisioterapeuta, Medico, Nutricionista, Psicologo, TecEnfermagem etc), gender/config-menu/decorative icons.

Layout primitives, adoption+state: PageContainer(app shell, 25 usages); DrawerBuilder(width 95vw<collapseRule else 50vw, standardized footer, destroyOnClose; 16 sites, PRESERVE); DefaultCardWrapper(4 usages); MobileCardWrapper(0 usages, DEAD); ItemDefault(isLight-aware row, 10 usages); ListItem(label/value row, 5 usages, used for ALL vitals/labs); Display(read-view field, hosts the --warning-color bug); DisplayCard; SkeletonList(loading placeholder); FadeLoading(full-viewport blocking spinner, mutations); AlertDelete(warning banner+Popconfirm 'Excluir', PRESERVE); Ball(two-tone dot, severity/presence, PRESERVE); RenderTagTable(coloured cell primitive, 8 admin tables, never wired to thresholds); HeaderForm(ubiquitous).

FormDadosProntuario (most valuable IP): config-driven clinical forms from a DadosFormDinamico[] array (not markup); nullStatus/nullifyFields nulls sub-objects on submit per group. CollapsedFields renders each group as Collapse.Panel, recurses into subGroups/campos/custom Fieldset. SelectCampoType dispatches over 10 typed renderers: string, select, interval, number, boolean, checkbox, data, list, masked, multicheck. 14 config files: dataFormEnfermagem, Fisioterapeuta, Fonoaudiologo, FormularioMedico, Farmaceutico, Musicoterapia, Nutricionista, Psicologo, TecEnfermagem, Paciente, Movimentacao, RemovePaciente, Intercorrencia, BalancoHidrico.

Static Form* components: parent-owned FormInstance, shared defaultFormRules, HeaderForm, mode:in_page|modal toggles disabled state. 10+ Filter* components: Form layout=vertical, onFilter/onClear, in a DrawerBuilder. Tables: Colum(n)s*Table.tsx exports ColumnType<T>[] with responsive:[xs|sm], delegating to RenderTagTable.

Clinical widgets (no generic AntD equivalent): CollapseCard(bed card, statusTrilha border+glow, MicroIndicadores row, per-trilha chips, inline-style, 11rem<->50rem via collapseAll); MicroIndicadores(icons: noradrenaline, mech ventilation, sedation, hemodialysis, LOS days, expected mortality %); TabRecomendacoes(Critérios+Último prontuário, statusTrilha-coloured tabs); TrilhaInterativa(accept/refuse, checks trilha.nome==='Sepse'||'Profilaxia'); Prescricao/HorarioCheck(med admin, 1 row/dose); BalancoHidrico*(fluid-balance, forked responsive trees); DisplayVideoUti(ICU camera <iframe>, blur(20px) toggle, stream not stopped); BuildVideoChat/VideoCall(Agora RTC, Firestore presence); MessagesList/MessageBallon(chat, REST+Firestore refresh); DisplayNotificaoes(bell+drawer, raw WebSocket).

Two tab implementations: AntD Tabs (TabRecomendacoes) + bespoke CustomTabs (sliding-underline, 2 usages). Dead (0 usages): Breadcrumbs (real AntD Breadcrumb, UUID-aware), MobileCardWrapper, SideFixedButton. BottomDrawer: 1 usage.

PageContainer = single layout root for authenticated pages: fixed Header/Content/Footer; cascading REST fetch empresa->estabelecimento->setor PER PAGE MOUNT (not shared cache); mobile hamburger Drawer(70vw) when width<collapseRule; header actions (auto-reload Switch, SwitchThemeButton, Tag breadcrumb trail, notification bell). Blocks render until token&&empresaAtual.id&&!loading - client-side auth gating, not SSR redirect.

Navigation: NO persistent side nav, NO AntD Menu. Entirely: (1) drill-down tile grids (DisplayCard/ListDashboard, ItemDefault/ListItem); (2) header context switcher; (3) CircularMenu FAB for bed-board actions; (4) hand-built Tag breadcrumb trail (bespoke, dead Breadcrumbs component unused); (5) permission-filtered settings tiles via useMenuByPermissions.

Route map (27 pages), strict nesting: / (Login) -> /empresa (picker) -> /empresa/[id] (dashboard, +feed, relatorio-evolucao, configuracoes CRUD) -> /estabelecimento/[id] (sectors, +chats) -> /setor/[id] (ICU bed board ListOcupacoes, CORE SCREEN, +auditoria, cameras, dashboard, inconsistencias) -> /leito/[id]/ocupacao/[id] (camera/video, +balanco, prescricao, sepse/[id_trilha]).

Auth: getServerSideProps calls validateRoute(ctx) checking token cookie only, redirect to / if absent. Route-level permission enforcement is opt-in via ignorePermission flag DEFAULTING TO TRUE (off); no page overrides it - real gating is client-side only (useEffectivePermissions). Drawer-in-drawer is the standard secondary-view pattern (no modal-routing): nests up to 2 levels deep; ListOcupacoes stacks 4 independent DrawerBuilders. No overlay-stack manager.

3 competing responsive strategies: (A) dominant ~42 files, useWindowSize()+collapsed=width<collapseRule; (B) forked trees (rare) - BalancoHidricoVisaoGeral renders <GridView> or <MobileView>; (C) ad-hoc span buckets - ListOcupacoes 5-bucket if-chain over window.innerWidth (>2800->4, 1800-2400->6, 1260-1800->8, 800-1260->12, <800->24), ignores collapseRule/AntD grid props. BUG: band (2400,2800] -> span undefined -> full-width on huge monitors. ListDashboard reimplements a DIFFERENT bucket set (>1800->6, 1260-1800->8, 800-1260->12, <800->24) - drift.

Clinical severity colour applied consistently to: InfoPacienteHeader, CollapseCard (border+glow+ball+gender-icon+age-badge), DashboardCard, MessageBallon (keyed off bed's alert), ItemNotificacao, TabRecomendacoes tab buttons (correctly per-trilha alerta).

Green/amber/red reinvented with divergent literals in >=6 places, none importing statusTrilha: canonical green#00DC50/red#FF1633/amber#ffd900-#ff5900; handleIconByStatus.ts green#258a10/red#ff1633/blue#1890ff('liberado'); HorarioCheck.tsx colorCheck green#389e0c/amber#d4b105; HorarioCheck.tsx popover green#acff76/red#ff5252; ItemProtocoloSepse.tsx red#e84748; DashboardCard.tsx gauge green#00DC50/red#FF1633/amber#FFAB00; DisplayNotificaoes.tsx toast amber#FFAB00 ALWAYS regardless of severity.

Two severity bugs: (1) notification toast hardcoded amber #FFAB00 regardless of severity; (2) TabRecomendacoes hard-codes literal statusTrilha['VERMELHO'] for criteria panel bg at every severity. DashboardCard occupancy amber(#FFAB00) silently differs from statusTrilha.AMARELO(#ffd900) though red/green match exactly. Sepsis completion states use shape-only encoding (no colour). Empty beds get flat #212433 border, indistinguishable from a NEUTRO occupied bed except by content.

BIGGEST GAP: no threshold-based flagging of abnormal values anywhere. Vitals(ItemSinaisVitais): HR, RR, BP, temp, SpO2, HGT, ventilation mode, O2 flow, FiO2, consciousness, pain - all 15 fields via neutral ListItem, no conditional styling; SpO2 99% and 60% render identically. Labs(InformacoesAssistenciais): BP, RASS, Glasgow, delirium, diuresis, fluid balance, temp, leukocytes, platelets, CRP, lactate, pH, bicarbonate, pO2, pCO2, P/F ratio, creatinine, urea, bilirubin - all neutral, no colour/icon/bold by range.

24h indicators(ItemIndicadores24h): fluid balance, diuresis, HGT, temp max - plain ListItem, no thresholding. Fluid-balance grid(GridView): every non-zero cell gets a fixed green pill #42e26f purely to signal 'value exists' - no pos/neg split, no range flag. SOFA score always renders AntD 'warning' tag whether 0 or 20+, no band escalation. RenderTagTable's colour arg is literal 'var(--primary-color)' at all 8 call sites (none clinical). Presence-only 'critical' flags exist: invasive-procedures badge (amber #d6a400), sepsis first-hour delay (red #e84748), bed occupancy % gauge.

Schema-driven engine backs every clinical data-entry form. No AntD Steps anywhere (grep=0) - 'multi-step' simulated via accordion (CollapsedFields), tabs, sequential drawers. Conditional fields use 3 unshared mechanisms: group-level nullify Switch (nullifyFields), sub-group checavel Switch (display:none/block), permission/tenant-type disabling (e.g. FormLeito disables name/code unless empresaData.tipo==='manual').

handleApiError always renders Modal.error regardless of validation/permission/server fault - no severity/type differentiation, called per REST catch block. Two loading affordances with no shared rule: SkeletonList(generic bars) vs FadeLoading(full-screen blocking spinner for most mutations) - heavy-handed for a tool where staff may need to keep working elsewhere on screen.

Auth = single global React Context, re-verifies token every mount, no query cache/react-query/SWR - every consumer re-renders on any change. REST: 19 resource files, memoized hooks over one shared axios instance. File uploads: base64-encode-then-POST (not direct-to-storage), inflates payload ~33%.

Three independent real-time channels, no shared abstraction: (1) Raw WebSocket(notifications) - two w3cwebsocket connections (list + toast, debounced 2s), bidirectional mark-as-read, no reconnect/backoff. (2) Firestore(onSnapshot) - signaling/presence ONLY, one doc shape chats/{setorId}/usuarios/{usuarioId}; chat history is paginated REST, not Firestore. (3) setInterval REST polling - the MISSION-CRITICAL bed board: dashboard+ListOcupacoes poll every empresa.tempo_atualizacao(per-tenant seconds)*1000ms; bed/vitals/alert state is NEVER pushed - a red alert can take up to tempo_atualizacao seconds to reach the grid vs near-instant toast.

DisplayVideoUti = passive ICU camera <iframe> embed of a separate microservice, blur(20px) privacy toggle (stream not stopped). BuildVideoChat/VideoCall = Agora RTC telemedicine, gated by hasVideoDevice check.

§7 inconsistencies (governance/typing/duplication): token file duplicated verbatim (variables.less vs next.config.js), never imported by build; 5/15 tokens dead; --warning-color referenced but never set; statusTrilha typed as any, never in token file; severity green/amber/red reinvented 6-7 ways w/ 2 severity bugs; non-monotonic root font-size cascade; Poppins loaded twice (one @font-face dead); .is-light naming outlier; two tab implementations; two icon systems no shared sizing; two unread-badge treatments; dead components 0 usages: Breadcrumbs, MobileCardWrapper, SideFixedButton.

§7 inconsistencies (bug/architecture/security): ListOcupacoes span dead-band (2400,2800]->undefined->full-width on huge monitors; two near-identical responsive grids hand-duplicated with drift; three real-time channels no shared reconnect/backoff; route permission enforcement defaults ignorePermission=true(off); PWA manifest still 'teleUTI'; theme toggle requires full reload.

§8 PRESERVE: dark-first compact default as an explicit decision; two-tier colour separation (immutable clinical severity vs tenant-overridable brand), governed/typed; config/schema-driven clinical form engine (strongest reusable IP); neumorphic elevation as brand signature via formal elevation-token pair; primitives DrawerBuilder/AlertDelete/Ball/MaterialIcon; per-tenant white-label branding CAPABILITY; Firestore-out-of-record PRINCIPLE.

§8 REPLACE (do not port as-is): 5-layer theming stack + full-reload light mode; runtime Less recompilation via dynamic-antd-theme; literal-everywhere tokens; JS-window.innerWidth responsive strategy w/ 3 competing variants; polling the mission-critical bed board; the 'no abnormal-value flagging' baseline.

constraints.text: The two colour systems MUST remain decoupled: clinical severity is immutable and NOT tenant-brand-customizable; brand primary colour is tenant-overridable. Conflating them risks reintroducing a patient-safety bug.

Do NOT port the legacy theming/branding mechanisms (5-layer stack, full-reload light toggle, runtime AntD Less recompile via dynamic-antd-theme); theme switching must be live, and per-tenant white-label CAPABILITY must be kept via a token/CSS-variable approach instead.

MUST introduce formal spacing/radius/elevation/z-index/motion/typography token scales; do not carry forward the literal-only ~340-literal-vs-15-token approach. Every var(--token) reference introduced must have a corresponding setter/:root definition (the legacy --warning-color permanently-unset defect must not recur).

Do NOT port the JS-window.innerWidth responsive strategy with 3 competing sub-strategies (including the known (2400,2800] dead-band bug); breakpoints must be unified into a single named source shared between JS and CSS.

The mission-critical bed board MUST NOT rely on REST polling; alert/bed-state updates must use the same push mechanism as the notification channel. Firestore or any realtime NoSQL layer must stay out of the clinical system-of-record path (signaling/presence only).

MUST design threshold-based abnormal-value visual flagging for vitals, labs, fluid balance, and SOFA score bands; the legacy 'no flagging anywhere' behavior is an unaddressed gap, not a baseline to replicate.

Preserve the neumorphic dual-shadow elevation signature (formalized as a governed elevation-token pair) and the config/schema-driven clinical form engine (FormDadosProntuario pattern) as the strongest reusable IP; do not re-hardcode per-role forms.
Route-level permission enforcement MUST default to deny (opposite of legacy's ignorePermission=true default-off posture); explicit per-route permission declarations are required.

open_questions: No published clinical reference ranges for vitals/labs thresholds exist in this design inventory (UI/UX gaps only) - abnormal-value colour bands must be sourced from clinical rule catalogs (RULE-* IDs), not this brief.
SOFA score colour-escalation bands are not specified in the legacy source - must be sourced from clinical guideline references.
